instructions.text: Turn each note into a quiz question

exampleQuestions: What is the energy source for photosynthesis?
How much oxygen does Amazon produce?
What percentage of oxygen comes from Amazon?
What does the Amazon rainforest produce?
At what temperature does water boil?
When does water turn to steam?

perfect.message: Great questions! You'd ace the quiz! ❓

tryAgain.message: Start with: What, Who, When, Where, Why, How
